Uses of Class
codedraw.Image

  • Uses of Image in codedraw

    Subclasses of Image in codedraw
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BorderlessWindow
    The BorderlessWindow class lets you create a borderless instance of a CodeDraw window and draw on it.
    class 
    CodeDraw
    CodeDraw is a beginner-friendly drawing library which can be used to create pictures, animations and even interactive applications.
    class 
    FullScreen
    The Fullscreen class lets you create fullscreen application and draw on it.
    Methods in codedraw that return Image
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Image
    Image.crop(Image source, int x, int y, int width, int height)
    Creates a new image from the given image that only contains the specified section.
    static Image
    Image.fromBase64String(String base64)
    Converts a Base64 string to an image.
    static Image
    Image.fromDPIAwareSize(int width, int height)
    Creates a CodeDraw image with an up-scaled resolution.
    static Image
    Image.fromFile(String pathToImage)
    Loads an image from the file system.
    static Image
    Image.fromResource(String resourceName)
    Loads images from the resource folder.
    static Image
    Image.fromUrl(String url)
    Loads an image file from the internet.
    static Image
    Image.mirrorHorizontally(Image image)
    Mirrors the image horizontally.
    static Image
    Image.mirrorVertically(Image image)
    Mirrors the image vertically.
    static Image
    Image.rotateClockwise(Image image)
    Rotates the image clockwise.
    static Image
    Image.rotateCounterClockwise(Image image)
    Rotates the image counter-clockwise.
    static Image
    Image.scale(Image source, double scale)
    Increases or decreases the size of the image given as a parameter.
    static Image
    Image.scale(Image source, double scale, Interpolation interpolation)
    Increases or decreases the size of the image given as a parameter.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Image
    Image.crop(Image source, int x, int y, int width, int height)
    Creates a new image from the given image that only contains the specified section.
    void
    Animation.draw(Image canvas)
    This method is called in regular intervals to draw onto the canvas.
    void
    Image.drawImage(double x, double y, double width, double height, Image image)
    Draws an image at the specified (x, y) coordinate.
    void
    Image.drawImage(double x, double y, double width, double height, Image image, Interpolation interpolation)
    Draws an image at the specified (x, y) coordinate.
    void
    Image.drawImage(double x, double y, Image image)
    Draws an image at the specified (x, y) coordinate.
    static Image
    Image.mirrorHorizontally(Image image)
    Mirrors the image horizontally.
    static Image
    Image.mirrorVertically(Image image)
    Mirrors the image vertically.
    static Image
    Image.rotateClockwise(Image image)
    Rotates the image clockwise.
    static Image
    Image.rotateCounterClockwise(Image image)
    Rotates the image counter-clockwise.
    static void
    Image.save(Image image, String pathToImage, ImageFormat format)
    Saves the image to the specified location using the specified image format.
    static Image
    Image.scale(Image source, double scale)
    Increases or decreases the size of the image given as a parameter.
    static Image
    Image.scale(Image source, double scale, Interpolation interpolation)
    Increases or decreases the size of the image given as a parameter.
    static BorderlessWindow
    BorderlessWindow.show(Image image)
    Shows the specified image in a borderless window fitting the size of the image.
    static CodeDraw
    CodeDraw.show(Image image)
    Shows the specified image in a CodeDraw window fitting the size of the image.
    Constructors in codedraw with parameters of type Image
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CursorStyle(Image image)
    Creates a new CursorStyle from an image.
     
    CursorStyle(Image image, int x, int y)
    Creates a new CursorStyle from an image.
     
    Image(Image image)
    Creates a copy of the image supplied as a parameter.
